summary: YouTube clip management app with Google account integration for auto-posting to YouTube channels
architectural_notes: Google OAuth integration for YouTube channel access
Automatic posting to user's YouTube channel via YouTube Data API
YouTube clip management with timestamps and embedded player
known_issues: Infinite loading spinner on main page (Version 54)
Build failures when adding multiple features simultaneously

existing_features.title: Modify the existing ChannelConnection component to use Google OAuth instead of the current mock implementation, displaying the connected Google account and YouTube channel information
Update the ClipCard component to disable the YouTube post button and show a helpful message when the user has not connected their Google account

new_feature_requests.summary: Google account connection for auto-posting clips to user's YouTube channel
Shut down server functionality in admin panel
Implement Google OAuth 2.0 authentication flow in the backend to allow users to connect their Google accounts and authorize the app to post videos to their YouTube channels
Update the existing postToYouTube backend method to use the stored Google OAuth credentials to automatically post clips to the user's connected YouTube channel without requiring manual interaction
Add backend validation to ensure users have connected their Google account before allowing them to post clips to YouTube

projectName: Enable Google account connection for automatic YouTube channel posting
